scripts.start:deploy: wait-on http://127.0.0.1:8545 && cd blockchain && npx hardhat run scripts/deploy.js --network localhost
scripts.start:ai: echo 'AI Integration has been migrated to Node.js backend services.'
scripts.start-all: concurrently --kill-others -n "ETH,DEPLOY,API,WEB" -c "cyan,blue,yellow,green" "npm run start:blockchain" "npm run start:deploy" "npm run start:backend" "npm run start:frontend"
